response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal C++ experience (only one brief role at National Instruments) and no demonstrable expertise in industrial automation, IEC 62443, secure development lifecycle, message brokers, or multi-threaded C++ systems — all core requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures using Node.js and DLang
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex software solutions
concerns: Lacks recent or substantial C++ development experience required for core responsibilities
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or SDL implementation
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT in industrial context) or on-premises automation platforms
